scripts.install:all: npm install && (cd frontend && npm install) && (cd backend/api-gateway && npm install) && (cd backend/user-service && npm install) && (cd backend/job-service && npm install) && (cd backend/matching-service && npm install) && (cd backend/availability-service && npm install) && (cd backend/location-service && npm install) && (cd backend/reputation-service && npm install)
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "GATEWAY,USER,JOB,MATCH,AVAIL,LOC,REP,WEB" -c "bgBlack.white,bgBlue,bgGreen,bgMagenta,bgCyan,bgYellow,bgRed,bgWhite.black" "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:job" "npm run start:matching" "npm run start:availability" "npm run start:location" "npm run start:reputation" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.start:user: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env PORT=5001 npm start --prefix backend/user-service
scripts.start:job: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env PORT=5002 npm start --prefix backend/job-service
scripts.start:matching: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env PORT=5003 npm start --prefix backend/matching-service
scripts.start:availability: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env PORT=5004 npm start --prefix backend/availability-service
scripts.start:location: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env PORT=5005 npm start --prefix backend/location-service
scripts.start:reputation: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env PORT=5006 npm start --prefix backend/reputation-service
